eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Indiana; at 04:36 AM ON MAY 21, 2026 Effective until 07:36 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
A Statewide AMBER Alert has been declared.

The Hammond Police Department has requested the activation of an AMBER Alert from Hammond, Indiana which is 163 miles northwest of Indianapolis.  

The victim, Devaeyah Lucas-Bell, is a 6 month old Black female, 22 inches tall, 16 pounds, black hair with brown eyes, and last seen wearing a white shirt and brown pants.  Devaeyah was last seen on Thursday, May 21, 2026 at 4:20 am in Hammond, Indiana and is believed to be in extreme danger. 
 
The suspect, Deandry Sabbs, is a 31year old Black male, 6 feet 2 inches tall, 208 pounds, black hair with brown eyes, last seen wearing unknown clothing, and driving a gray 4-door Nissan sedan with unknown Illinois plates. 

If you have any information on this incident, contact the Hammond Police Department at 219-852-6357 or 911.
